name: Bacon Rice Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup White wine or chicken broth
1 lb Bacon, crisply cooked - cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together all ingredients.
2. Use the mixture to stuff a 12 to 14 pound turkey. Alternatively, prepare half the recipe for a 4 to 5 pound chicken, duck, goose, or three game hens.
Cooked wild rice can be substituted for all or part of the long grain rice.
3. To Prepare Cornish Hens:
- Prepare half the above recipe.
- Clean and stuff 2 or 3 hens with the stuffing.
- Melt about half a cube of butter.
- Place the hens in a small roasting pan or baking dish.
- Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
- Pour the melted butter over the hens.
- Bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours at 375 degrees, basting frequently with butter/juices.
4. Serve hot with fresh green vegetables.
